notes: Thresholds for the AI quality canary (cron: 0 */6 * * *). Hard floors always alarm and go to Sentry. Soft thresholds go to PostHog only. Calibrated 2026-04-23 from smoke test against real prod ('inngest' keyword, 67 summaries, 76% persona / 0% robotic).

ai_logs_count_since_run_start.reason: Zero AI logs means analyze-content function isn't running. Today's 2026-04-23 incident: Inngest deploy-orphan state kept analyze-content silent for 4+ hours with zero dashboard signal. This check would have caught it in 30 min. Scoped check: only alarms when results_audited ALSO == 0, because cache hits produce aiSummaries without aiLogs rows (24-hr cache + cross-monitor dedup) — those are healthy pipeline activity.

persona_rate.reason: Below 75% analyst voice means the summarize prompt has regressed or switched models without updated prompt. Recalibrated 2026-04-23 22:30 UTC after variance probe with corrected PERSONA_PROBES: production mean is 93% (σ=2.7pp over 5 runs × 20 items = 100 samples). 75% gives margin for variance + content mix shifts while still catching real regressions. Old floor of 30% was based on broken probes.

robotic_rate.reason: More than 10% robotic templates ('Sentiment: X', 'Topic: Y') means the prompt structure broke — likely a Zod schema mismatch coercing output.

banned_opener_rate.reason: More than 20% banned openers ('This is a...', 'The post...') means persona voice regressed specifically at the output start. Recalibrated 2026-04-23 22:30 UTC after variance probe: production steady-state is ~8% (σ=2.7pp over 5 runs × 20 items). 0.20 gives 4σ headroom for content-mix shifts. Earlier 0.60 threshold was set before we had variance data. The 50% canary first-run was misleading — it sampled only GitHub technical content where banned openers skew high.

soft_thresholds.notes: Soft thresholds warn but don't page. 3-consecutive-runs smoothing prevents single-cycle flukes from noise (e.g., one slow Reddit scan returning only 2 results).
